channel.title: BandiRadar — matched opportunities
channel.description: Italian public funding opportunities matched to a company profile.

item.title: EFFICIENTAMENTO ENERGETICO CENTRALE TERMICA PLESSO SCOLASTICO COMUNALE
item.description: Score 78/100. Deadline: —. Opportunity is in Lombardia, matching company's regional focus; Value of €60,000.6 is within company's declared range (€20,000–€2,000,000); CPV 45300000 (building installation work) aligns with company's CPV interest 45000000; Energy efficiency retrofit of school thermal system falls within company's ristrutturazione and manutenzione straordinaria capabilities; Public works for local entities matches company's stated experience with enti locali
